rules.corporate_shadows_style: Omni visual style: dark cinematic documentary, image-rich, short generated clips, real images only when high-quality and licensed.
rules.generated_clip_duration_target: Under 8-10 seconds per clip before a beat change or variation.
rules.saints_gate: Gate removed by user instruction on 2026-06-08. Continue Saints production and publish ready episodes immediately after QC/rights checks pass.
rules.saints_priority: active production and release focus: verified visuals, rights-safe scripts, QC, private draft upload, and immediate public release after checks pass
